objective: Investigate and fix Spark tool-calling failure — codex-rs source investigation + opencodex adapter fix

workPhases.title: Investigate codex-rs tool architecture + fix spark tool-calling

tasks.title: Dispatch sol explorers for codex-rs source investigation (Copernicus) and web search (Banach/Socrates)
Identify 5 tool types codex-rs emits: function, namespace, tool_search, web_search, custom
Discover use_responses_lite controls AdditionalTools delivery format
Keep use_responses_lite: true for spark in catalog (tools via AdditionalTools)
Build stripSparkCompatibility: process additional_tools, flatten namespaces, drop custom/tool_search, strip defer_loading, drop unsupported input types
Add tool_search to UNSUPPORTED_HOSTED_TOOLS for spark

criteria.expectedEvidence: spark subagent runs echo hello and returns output
